18 typedef DivKGradGradMScheme<OrderedStencilBuilderT<Cell>,
19  OrderedStencilBuilderT<Face>,
20  CoefficientArrayBuilderWithInserterT<Cell>,
21  CoefficientArrayBuilderWithInserterT<Face> > DivKGradGradMSchemeWithOrderedStencil;
22 
23 typedef DivKGradGradMScheme<CooresCellStencilBuilder,
24  OrderedStencilBuilderT<Face>,
25  CoefficientArrayBuilderWithInserterT<Cell, CooresCellStencilBuilder>,
26  CoefficientArrayBuilderWithInserterT<Face> > DivKGradGradMSchemeWithCooresStencil;
27
